description_long: This is a modern, asymmetrical wooden shelving unit with a rich, reddish-brown wood grain finish. The structure features two main vertical sections of different heights, connected by a central horizontal shelf that creates a stepped profile. The left section is open on two sides, forming a tall, rectangular cubby, while the right section contains two horizontal shelves, providing ample storage or display space. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with sharp, clean edges and no visible hardware, doors, or handles. The back and sides are fully enclosed, emphasizing the geometric, minimalist design. This piece would be suitable for use as a display shelf, bookcase, or storage unit in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A modern, asymmetrical wooden shelving unit with a stepped profile, open cubby, and two horizontal shelves, finished in a rich reddish-brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cubby on the left, stepped central shelf, and two horizontal shelves on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible openings or shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the open cubby now on the right and the shelves on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid wood panel with no openings.
